quality:ux-g02.command: npm run build -w @epis2/contracts && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-domain && npm run build -w @epis2/design-system && npm run build -w @epis2/command-registry && npm run build -w @epis2/clinical-forms && npm run build -w @epis2/test-fixtures && tsx scripts/qa/run-ux-g02-validation.ts
